title: ixora stipulata
intro: Ixora stipulata, also known as the wild flame or forest flame, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ixora stipulata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Ixora stipulata include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
